overview: Advanced Hormone Solutions specializes in bio-identical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) and sexual medicine, using a functional medicine approach to address root causes of hormonal imbalance. The practice provides individualized health evaluations and treatment plans through comprehensive lab analysis and nutritional guidance.
highlights: PRP procedures for penile and vaginal rejuvenation
Comprehensive lab analysis and supplement recommendations
targetAudience: Adults seeking functional medicine approach to hormone optimization and sexual health.
